words.exEn: The water in the lake was as high as my chest.
words.exKr: 호수의 물이 내 가슴 높이까지 왔다.

words.exEn: I have confidence that I did well on the test.
words.exKr: 나는 시험을 잘 봤다는 자신감이 있다.

words.exEn: As a consequence of missing my bus, I had to find another way to work.
words.exKr: 버스를 놓친 결과로, 나는 출근할 다른 방법을 찾아야만 했다.

words.exEn: When the car crashed, it was a disaster.
words.exKr: 차가 충돌했을 때, 그것은 끔찍한 재난이었다.
words.hint: A very bad event or accident.

words.exEn: The loud noise disturbed me while I was working.
words.exKr: 내가 일하는 동안 큰 소음이 나를 방해했다.

words.exEn: The boy estimated that he was one meter tall.
words.exKr: 소년은 자신의 키가 1미터쯤 될 것이라고 짐작했다.
words.hint: To make a rough guess about a number.

words.exEn: Each year we honor those who died fighting for their country.
words.exKr: 매년 우리는 나라를 위해 싸우다 돌아가신 분들을 기린다.

words.exEn: He was able to impress the girls with his new dance.
words.exKr: 그는 새로운 춤으로 소녀들에게 깊은 인상을 줄 수 있었다.

words.exEn: The bridge is too narrow for a car to drive across it.
words.exKr: 그 다리는 자동차가 건너가기에 너무 좁다.

words.exEn: The girl's skin was very pale.
words.exKr: 소녀의 피부는 매우 창백했다.
words.hint: Light in color, like when you're sick.

words.exEn: The rough ground hurt my feet.
words.exKr: 거친 땅 때문에 내 발이 아팠다.

words.exEn: It will satisfy my teacher if I finish all my homework.
words.exKr: 내가 숙제를 다 끝내면 선생님께서 만족하실 것이다.
words.hint: To make someone happy with a result.

words.exEn: The girl saw a spider and screamed.
words.exKr: 소녀는 거미를 보고 비명을 질렀다.
words.hint: To shout very loudly in fear.

words.exEn: My teeth are sensitive to cold things.
words.exKr: 내 치아는 차가운 것에 예민하다.

words.exEn: It was hot outside, so the boy sat in the shade of a tree.
words.exKr: 밖이 더워서, 소년은 나무 그늘에 앉았다.
words.hint: A cool area blocked from sunlight.

words.exEn: Eating good food builds up your strength.
words.exKr: 좋은 음식을 먹으면 힘이 길러진다.

words.exEn: He supplements his diet with fresh fruits.
words.exKr: 그는 식단에 신선한 과일을 보충한다.
words.hint: To add extra to make it complete.

words.exEn: I felt a sense of terror when the tiger chased me.
words.exKr: 호랑이가 나를 쫓아왔을 때 나는 공포를 느꼈다.

words.exEn: Due to the dark clouds, there was a threat of a bad storm.
words.exKr: 먹구름 때문에, 심한 폭풍우가 닥칠 조짐이 있었다.

words.exEn: I was a victim of a robbery.
words.exKr: 나는 강도 사건의 피해자였다.
